Song {
    metadata: Metadata {
        title: None,
        subtitles: [],
        artists: [],
        composers: [],
        lyricists: [],
        album: None,
        year: None,
        key: None,
        tempo: None,
        capo: None,
        custom: [],
    },
    lines: [
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "title",
                value: Some(
                    "Simple Song",
                ),
            },
        ),
        Empty,
        Lyrics(
            LyricsLine {
                segments: [
                    LyricsSegment {
                        chord: Some(
                            Chord {
                                name: "Am",
                            },
                        ),
                        text: "Hello ",
                    },
                    LyricsSegment {
                        chord: Some(
                            Chord {
                                name: "G",
                            },
                        ),
                        text: "world",
                    },
                ],
            },
        ),
        Lyrics(
            LyricsLine {
                segments: [
                    LyricsSegment {
                        chord: Some(
                            Chord {
                                name: "C",
                            },
                        ),
                        text: "Goodbye ",
                    },
                    LyricsSegment {
                        chord: Some(
                            Chord {
                                name: "D",
                            },
                        ),
                        text: "moon",
                    },
                ],
            },
        ),
    ],
}
